title: Claude Code + Graphify = Insane Agentic OS
summary: Graphify constructs a knowledge graph representation of codebases, enabling Claude Code to query project structure efficiently without re-reading entire repositories. The tool reduces token costs and improves speed and accuracy when using Claude for code analysis by providing a structured map of the project.
writeup: This video demonstrates Graphify, a tool that builds knowledge graphs of code repositories so Claude can query project structure instead of reading entire codebases. The approach matters because it reduces token consumption, lowers costs, and improves accuracy during code analysis. Graphify is shown inside an agentic operating system architecture that combines Claude Code, Hermes, and AntiGravity dashboards.
